bibliographic_info.title: Exploring characteristics of BDS-3 PPP-B2b augmentation messages by a three-step analysis procedure

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2023) 27:119 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-023-01457-x ORIGINAL ARTICLE Exploring characteristics of BDS‑3 PPP‑B2b augmentation messages by a three‑step analysis procedure Chenhao Ouyang1 · Junbo Shi1 · Wenjie Peng1 · Xinying Dong1 · Jiming Guo1 · Yibin Yao1 Received: 5 August 2022 / Accepted: 10 April 2023 / Published online: 28 April 2023 © The Author(s), under
Three new message characteristics are obtained by analyzing 863,895 PPP-B2b augmentation messages collected in June 2022 following a three-step analysis procedure.

First, augmentation messages are broadcasted in the order of Message Type 1 (satellite mask), Type 4 (clock correction), Type 3 (DCB correc- tion) and Type 2 (orbit correction) within each 48-s cycle.
